description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house surrounded by a variety of trees and landscaping, giving it a secluded and private feel. The structure features clean, rectilinear lines and a predominantly white and light gray exterior, with large windows and flat roofs. The house includes several outdoor living spaces, such as patios and terraces, some of which are partially covered. The landscaping incorporates both evergreen and flowering trees, adding color and texture to the property. The building appears to have multiple wings and levels, with a mix of open and enclosed spaces, and a garage or carport visible in one view. The overall design emphasizes openness, integration with nature, and contemporary architectural elements.
description: A modern, multi-story house with flat roofs, large windows, and extensive landscaping, featuring patios and terraces integrated with the surrounding trees.
description_view_0: The house is partially obscured by dense trees, with the main structure and some upper levels visible above the foliage.
description_view_1: This view highlights the central patio area, open terraces, and a garage or carport on the right side, with the house's geometric layout clearly visible.
description_view_2: The rear of the house is shown, revealing additional terraces, a mix of open and enclosed spaces, and more of the landscaping wrapping around the property.
description_view_3: The left side of the house is visible, with a strong emphasis on the flat rooflines, large windows, and a prominent garage or carport area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flat overhang, large glass door, and no visible steps or porch, blending seamlessly with the facade.
